narrative:
Mentor-On-The-Lake City has 4,735 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
